data.name: AppendByteConfirmationString
data.value: You have reached the end of file. Do you want append one byte ? This operation cannot be canceled if you continue.

data.name: ClickToGoAtPositionString
data.value: Click to go to at position.

data.name: FileDroppingConfirmationString
data.value: Do you want close the current file and open :

data.name: PasteExtendByteConfirmationString
data.value: Paste operation reached the end of file. Do you want extend the file for complete operation ? This operation cannot be canceled if you continue.

data.name: WritingErrorExeptionString
data.value: An error is occurs when writing.

data.name: ReplaceTrimSettingString
data.value: Trim the data on the find length when replace

data.name: ConvertStringToLongErrorString
data.value: Can't convert this string to long

data.name: OpenAsReadOnlyString
data.value: The file is locked. Do you want to open it in read-only mode?

data.name: StatusNoMoreBookmarksAfter
data.value: No more bookmarks after current position

data.name: StatusNoMoreBookmarksBefore
data.value: No more bookmarks before current position

data.name: FillWithByteTooltipString
data.value: Fill selection with a specific byte value

data.name: ReplaceByteTooltipString
data.value: Replace all occurrences of one byte with another

data.name: ReverseSelectionTooltipString
data.value: Reverse the byte order in selection (endianness conversion)

data.name: InvertSelectionTooltipString
data.value: Invert all bits in each byte (XOR with 0xFF)

data.name: RelativeSearchTblLoadedString
data.value: TBL loaded: {0} entries (will be used for validation)

data.name: RelativeSearchFoundWithValidationString
data.value: Found {0} proposals in {1}ms (top match validated by loaded TBL!)

data.name: RelativeSearchNoProposalsString
data.value: No encoding proposals found. Try different search text.

data.name: RelativeSearchKnownTextTooltipString
data.value: Enter text you know appears in the ROM (e.g., "World", "Start", "Hero")

data.name: RelativeSearchExportTooltipString
data.value: Save the selected encoding proposal as a TBL file

data.name: TblEditor_NoTblLoaded
data.value: No TBL file loaded. Please load a TBL file first.

data.name: TblEditor_UnsavedChanges
data.value: You have unsaved changes. Do you want to save before closing?

data.name: TblEditor_PrefixConflict
data.value: Entry '{0}' is prefix of {1} longer entries

data.name: TblEditor_Suggestion_RemoveShorter
data.value: Remove shorter entry or use different byte values

data.name: TblEditor_Search
data.value: Search by hex value or character

data.name: CustomTemplate_ApplyingTemplate
data.value:
Applying template '{0}' to the current file.

This will parse {1} blocks according to your template definition.

Note: Full integration with HexEditor requires connecting to the main view model.
data.comment: Custom Template - Applying template message
